global_description: Small mammal with a compact, rounded body, covered in soft fur, typically gray, brown, or white. It has long ears, a short fluffy tail, and strong hind legs for hopping.

part_details.head: Small with long ears and soft fur
part_details.body: Compact and rounded, covered in soft fur
part_details.ears: Long and upright, covered in fur

spatial_relations: Ears positioned on top of head
